title: Device Home Screen - Default Quick Settings
scenario: Device Home Screen displays three default quick settings tiles matching the first three options from Device Settings
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Observe the quick settings tiles displayed below the device image.
Count the number of default quick settings tiles shown.
Open the Device Settings screen for the connected device.
Note the first three options listed in the Device Settings screen.
Return to the Home screen and compare the quick settings tiles to the first three Device Settings options.
expected: Three default quick settings tiles are displayed below the device image on the Home screen, and they correspond to the first three options from the Device Settings screen.
